output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel(COUNT(?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q31163 .
  ?event wdt:P1343 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q3385660 .
  ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = 'en')
}
GROUP BY ?team ?teamLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel(COUNT(?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q31163 .
  ?event wdt:P1343 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q3385660 .
  ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = 'en')
}
GROUP BY ?team ?teamLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
```
